rationale.R1.2: The agent revised the passage for concision and structural clarity, flagging two substantive claims that need softening or backing.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding text but did not check all evidence-claim linkages.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (perfect consistency) and marks confidence for other recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits are not.
